title: Minecraft Parody Song Music Discs
description: Adds 5 Minecraft Parody Songs made by various Youtubers
body:
# Added Features
- **Revenge** - by CaptainSparklez 
<details>
<summary>Replaced Disc</summary>

(Precipice)

</details>



- **TNT (2015 Remix)** - by CaptainSparklez 
<details>
<summary>Replaced Disc</summary>

(Wait)

</details>



- **Don't Mine At Night** - by Bebop Vox 
<details>
<summary>Replaced Disc</summary>

(Ward)

</details>



- **I Placed A Bed** - by indawgnito 
<details>
<summary>Replaced Disc</summary>

(13)

</details>



- **That's What I Mine** - by Twi Shorts 
<details>
<summary>Replaced Disc</summary>

(Relic)

</details>

# Song Links
- [Revenge by CaptainSparklez](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hgZGPfxOM_I)

- [TNT (2015 Remix) by CaptainSparklez](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qrNk9twT4lY)

- [Don't Mine At Night by Bebop Vox](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X_XGxzMrq04)

- [I Placed A Bed by indawgnito](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Av3VFJrlg3k)

- [That's What I Mine by Twi Shorts](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3UtAx5f7CpQ)
# Q/A
Q: Why only 1.21 and over?

A: This is because one of the music discs that are replaced were added in 1.21

---
Q: Why these specific songs?

A: These are parody songs that I personally like, so I added them into the game for me and other to enjoy

---
Q: Will more songs be added?

A: Probably not. Even though it's pretty simple to make a resource pack like this, it was still pretty time consuming, and I'm also lazy. Even the time I spend writing this right now is time consuming so I'm gonna stop.
